label: Image Gallery
summary: Instructions-only soft dossier for a server-rendered image gallery: a responsive grid of atmosphere/portfolio/product photos with semantic alt text and progressive loading. Renders 6-24 images in a CSS grid that re-flows from 1-column on phones to 3-4 columns on desktop. No lightbox JS, no carousel, no fetch — purely presentational over the asset list provided by the brief. Hard alternatives (yet-another-react-lightbox, photoswipe-react) are planned imports for sites that need fullscreen viewers.
